# RubyCon

> Finnish sole proprietorship - custom web application development, fractional developer and fractional CTO services by Mateusz Górniak. Based in Finland, working remotely across the EU.

## Main pages

- [English homepage](https://rubycon.fi/): Web application developer and fractional CTO site in English
- [Polish homepage](https://rubycon.fi/pl/): Polish version of the site
- [Finnish homepage](https://rubycon.fi/fi/): Finnish version of the site

## Services

- Custom web application development (MVP to production)
- Backend development and API design
- Fractional developer and fractional CTO support
- Legacy migrations and architecture review
- Production reliability, monitoring, and sensible EU security practices

## Typical client situations

- Building an MVP before investors or first customers
- Product works but development feels slow or risky
- Need a senior technical voice without a full-time CTO
- Legacy system blocking new features
- Multi-sided platforms and SaaS products
